name: Touch of Honey Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine 1 cup of flour, oat bran, yeast, and salt.
2. Heat water, honey, and butter until very warm. Add to the dry ingredients. Beat at low speed of an electric mixer until moistened.
3. Increase speed to medium and continue beating for 3 minutes. Stir in enough remaining flour to form a stiff dough.
4. Lightly spray the bowl with vegetable oil, cooking spray, or oil lightly. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Knead for 8 to 10 minutes or until smooth and elastic.
5. Place into the prepared bowl, turning once to coat the surface of the dough. Cover and let rise in a warm place for 30 minutes or until doubled in size.
6. Lightly oil an 8 x 4 inch loaf pan. Punch down the dough.
7. Roll into a 15 x 7 inch rectangle. Starting at the narrow end, roll up the dough tightly. Pinch the ends and seam to seal; place seam side down in the prepared pan.
8. Cover and let rise in a warm place for 30 minutes or until doubled in size.
9. Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from the pan and cool on a wire rack for 1 hour before serving.
